AboutPage.title: NienSuViet
AboutPage.description: NienSuViet is a platform dedicated to digitizing Vietnamese history, offering you a comprehensive and vivid perspective on the nation's development journey. We compile and organize historical events chronologically, helping you easily track and understand the flow of history from the Hung Vuong era to the present day. With a mission to preserve and disseminate Vietnamese historical and cultural values to younger generations and the international community.

Hero.description: Discover Vietnam's historical journey through an interactive timeline, notable figures, and compelling stories.

HowItWorks.subtitle: Find events by timeline, look up figures, view maps, and discover documents in just a few steps.

item-1.question: What is NienSuViet?
item-1.answer: NienSuViet is a platform that helps you discover Vietnamese history through an interactive timeline, figures, and documents.

item-2.question: Is the content reliable?
item-2.answer: We compile from multiple sources and continuously verify and update to ensure accuracy.

item-3.question: Can I contribute or suggest content?
item-3.answer: Yes. You can contact us to submit suggestions, edit proposals, or add document sources.

item-4.question: Can I use NienSuViet on mobile?
item-4.answer: Yes. The app/website is optimized to work well on both desktop and mobile devices.

item-5.question: How do I get started?
item-5.answer: Just visit the events page, search by timeline or explore by topic and historical period.

Cta.description: Join thousands of users exploring and learning about national history. Try for free today!

Team.memberTagline: Dedicated to preserving and developing national history

Testimonials.subtitle: Thousands of users trust and use NienSuViet to explore and learn about national history

items.name: Nguyen Van An
items.comment: Amazing website! It helped me understand national history better. Beautiful interface and easy to use.

items.name: Tran Thi Mai
items.comment: As a history teacher, I regularly use NienSuViet to prepare lessons. Accurate and rich content, very useful for teaching.

items.name: Le Hoang Nam
items.comment: The interactive timeline is impressive! I can easily find and track historical events from the Hung Vuong era to modern times. A wonderful resource.

items.name: Pham Minh Chau
items.comment: My 10th grade son loves history because of this website. The images and documents make learning much more engaging than textbooks.

items.name: Vo Thanh Cong
items.comment: As a history enthusiast, I found valuable materials on NienSuViet. Especially the historical maps section is very intuitive and understandable.

items.name: Hoang Thi Lan
items.comment: The website is very professionally and scientifically designed. I've recommended it to many friends to learn about Vietnamese history.
